parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Discovery

actor Client
participant "Alias" as Alias << (R,#E6E6FA) >>

Client -> Alias : HEAD
Alias --> Client : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

note left of Client
  **Header**    **Value**
  Profile   <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,
            <target-profile>
  Allow     //target's Allow values//
  Location  //target URL//
end note

@enduml
```
